coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that generates and injects Schema.org structured data (JSON-LD) for video content to improve search engine optimization (SEO) and discoverability.

featureOwnership: JSON-LD metadata injection into page head
Transcript extraction and structured data inclusion

inputData: Player sources metadata (name, description, poster, duration)
Entry metadata from Kaltura backend (createdAt, endDate, tags)
stateManagement: Chapter data aggregation from multiple sources
Cue source priority tracking (Unisphere vs TimedMetadata)

repositories.name: kaltura/kaltura-player-js
repositories.relationship: Core player SDK providing BasePlugin, event system, and player API

repositories.name: kaltura/playkit-js-kaltura-cuepoints
repositories.relationship: Cue Points Manager for chapters and captions (optional for enhanced mode)

services: Kaltura Backend API (baseEntry.get for multilingual metadata)

consumers: Search engines (Google, Bing) via JSON-LD structured data
Parent frame applications (via postMessage for iframe embeds)
Video SEO rich results and key moments display

externalAPIs.name: Schema.org
externalAPIs.usage: JSON-LD vocabulary for VideoObject, Clip, AudioObject, CreativeWork types

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura OVP Provider
externalAPIs.usage: Request builder for backend API calls

entryPoints.description: Main Seo class extending BasePlugin - core logic
Service for fetching captions and attachments

errorPatterns: SEO Structured Data Required properties are missing
Failed to handle captions or attachments
failed to get base entry properties from server

basic.description: Automatic structured data generation from basic video metadata (name, description, thumbnail, duration, dates)

enhanced.description: Includes chapters (key moments) and transcript in structured data

dynamic.description: Direct JSON-LD injection into document head

iframe.description: Structured data sent to parent frame via postMessage
iframe.action: Customer must add message listener to inject JSON-LD
